title: Toilet expansion
description: A mod that adds many entities including Skibidi toilets And Alliance members. Its heavily inspired by Dafuqbooms series on Youtube. Currently adds 14 unique entities!     Until fixed the mod is reccomended to be downloaded on version 1.20.1
body:
This is heavily inspired by the skibidi toilet series on youtube made by dafuqboom

**This mod adds various types of entities Including**                                         
Small toilet,Big toilet,Giant toilet,Gman toilet,Flying toilet, Tv man,Large tv man,Speaker large tv man,Titan tv man,Titan cinemaman,Upgraded titan cinemaman. And more in the future!

**This mod also adds weapons for example:**  
Tv head,Titan tv head,small Tv head. And more!

**Explanation**                                                                               
This mod adds skibidi toilets wich fight tv men the toilets goal is to destroy the world and kill every tv man and human and the tv men try to stop that from happening but they need your help. So your job is to stop it from happening and help the tv men in the battle. Also there are alot of weapons dropped by the tv men and skibidi toilets, wich can be used to fight or defend yourself

**Note**                                                                                          
This mod is work in progress so during the updates there will be way more content to explore.
